# Coming Soon: Activate 19 in London - Iterable

## Coming Soon: Activate 19 in London

**Published by**

September 11, 2019

![Activate London](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/091019_Activate-London_768x512-1.png)

Our signature conference, Activate, is heading across the pond to London next month on Thursday, October 3! Registration is open, so make sure to reserve your spot.

Activate 19 will host 100+ innovative marketers at The Montcalm Royal London House. Together, we’ll discuss strategies to better engage consumers and provide a behind-the-scenes peek into the campaigns that achieved major success.

### Great Brands, Great Stories

We’ve invited guest speakers from prominent European brands to share insights on how they’re leveraging cross-channel marketing to drive engagement and growth. Joining us for the day will be an amazing roster of speakers from carwow, DFDS, MVF, Namecheap, Really Good Emails and UNiDAYS.

Together, we’ll be exploring how digital marketing is evolving in an era of rising customer expectations and address key challenges we all face as marketers:

*   Transitioning from legacy MarTech
*   Enhancing the customer experience
*   Managing data in the era of GDPR
*   Going deeper with personalization to increase engagement 
*   Localizing content for email, mobile and other channels
*   and much more!

We’ve designed an engaging day of session content that we’re looking forward to sharing with everyone. After Activate, you’ll leave with the information needed to drive change inside your own organization.

### Join Us at Activate 19 in London

We’re very excited for this opportunity to expand the Activate experience across our international audience! Activate is the best place to learn how to elevate the marketing experience you deliver.

Learn the best practices of high-performing marketing teams and hone the skills that amplify the voices of leading brands everywhere.

To view highlights from our San Francisco event and get an idea of what to expect, check out the video below.

Register today using promo code ‘BLOG50’ to receive 50% off an All-Access Pass to the conference, including all keynotes,  educational sessions, collaborative roundtables and networking happy hours.

In the meantime, please email activate19@iterable.com with any questions.

We look forward to seeing you at Activate London!
